title: Mega's SkyBlock
description: modpack for Hypixel Skyblock 1.21.10-26.1 by MegaChromeX! Have all new mods for good gameplay and best FPS.
body:
### 📄About modpack
This modpack have ALL mods for Hypixel server in Skyblock RPG game. This modpack done for 1.21.10-1.21.11 version, that doing best optimization and also make better ping in your gameplay.
Modpack updating every mods update and don't do you with bugs
(+ you can put Hypixel+/FurfSky resource pack)
![FPS test | Lobby Hub #1 with 59 players](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e9f0920c2a78d5d3ecfdaecaebe69a860de26de.png)

### ❓Why you need this
Modpack do hypixel skyblock better gameplay part for early and mid game players. You learn about new mechanincs and ways for your game.

### ✨Features
You can fully customize modpack and delete or add new mods if you need this. However, in most cases, this is not necessary, as the modpack contains everything you need (minimum)
![Customization Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3a7c0eb9505398d2c44725e726bc7c8bc50c5ec.png)


### 🛠️More optimization
If you need more optimization or you have lags, paste this Java arguments into modpack:

```
-XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+UseStringDeduplication -XX:StringDeduplicationAgeThreshold=3 -XX:+DisableExplicitGC
```

If you using latest Minecraft version (1.21.11+), use **Java 25** for modpack
